confirmation.title: Almost there. Please confirm your email.
confirmation.lead: One last step keeps the list clean and protects you from unwanted email. Open the message we sent and tap the confirmation button.
confirmation.seoTitle: Confirm Your Zen Eyer Newsletter Subscription
confirmation.seoDescription: Confirm your Zen Eyer newsletter subscription and choose what kind of updates you want to receive.
steps: Check your inbox for the confirmation email from Zen Eyer.
After confirmation, you will receive only selected Zen Eyer updates.
confirmation.note: Did not ask to subscribe? You can ignore the email safely. No newsletter will be sent unless the subscription is confirmed.

preferences.title: Choose what you want to receive.
preferences.lead: This page is where subscribers can update their email status, change lists, or unsubscribe without friction.
preferences.seoDescription: Manage your Zen Eyer newsletter subscription, email preferences, and unsubscribe options.
steps: Use the form below to keep receiving Zen Eyer updates or unsubscribe.
Changes should be simple, explicit, and reversible when possible.
You can resubscribe later from the website if you change your mind.
preferences.note: A clean preference center reduces spam complaints, improves deliverability, and keeps the audience relationship respectful.
preferences.recommended_standard: Recommended standard: keep the unsubscribe option visible, without requiring login and without hiding the main action.

embedHelper: In WordPress, place the MailPoet confirmation or manage-subscription block/shortcode here. The React page gives the public route, branding, copy, and SEO shell.
trustCopy: Updates are for music releases, Zouk events, useful content, and important Zen Eyer news. You stay in control.
